Root/Academics|cc4b4889402ee4fba5d345612.answer: Students must maintain a minimum of 75% attendance in all subjects to be eligible for end-semester examinations.

Root/Academics|715ba6acf67057780b46056ca.answer: The university follows a 10-point CGPA grading system. A score of 90% and above corresponds to an 'O' (Outstanding) grade.

Root/Academics|49eecdb1e48c10587dda9dbfe.answer: Any student found possessing unauthorized materials during examinations will be debarred for one year.

Root/Academics|2e00e4a775bb0410a610ae893.answer: Students must register for courses at least one week before the commencement of the semester.

Root/Academics|583551142239d01992843e7d0.answer: Students failing a course may apply for supplementary exams within 15 days of result declaration.

Root/Hostels|65e2784192d997fb84f0c6f3cd8.answer: All residents must be inside the hostel premises by 9:30 PM. Late entry requires prior permission from the warden.

Root/Hostels|b785d09af158e48b8e4e249e0e7.answer: Visitors are allowed only in the common areas between 4:00 PM and 7:00 PM on weekends.

Root/Hostels|43adb244cdb9e8790345bd5b481.answer: Silence hours are to be observed from 11:00 PM to 6:00 AM. Loud music is strictly prohibited.

Root/Hostels|a1d7a28e61cc937ec8b88361d81.answer: Residents are responsible for the cleanliness of their rooms. Weekly inspections will be conducted by the warden.

Root/Hostels|fbef05f6f753b606acecb1f6bdd.answer: Breakfast is served from 7:30 AM to 9:00 AM. Dinner is served from 7:30 PM to 9:00 PM.
